title: Spectrum Basalt Mode (Dark Mode)
description: A Spectrum dark mode texture pack utilizing the smooth basalt texture instead of calcite.
body:
A texture pack for Spectrum replacing the Calcite in inventories with Smooth Basalt. Heavily inspired by and uses colors from Default Dark Mode by nebulr, so they pair nicely!

Also includes some minor changes to the Pedestals and borders, updating some textures to be more accurate to others. Because why not!

**Spectrum 1.9 update: files include 2 versions, Vanilla and Custom**
- Vanilla uses the vanilla Smooth Basalt textures to match with Spectrum + gen1 gem sprites in the Pedestals. (WIP)
- Custom uses the custom-made Smooth Basalt textures made by Azzyypaaras + the gem sprites in the Pedestals. 

<details>
<summary>Includes HEAVY Spectrum spoilers! Check Gallery for non-spoiler examples!</summary>

![pedestal 4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c28d09b7f513c691498c4a313c81c19a8a6305ef.png)
![creative inv](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d29e7fd40f48fdcb807c2e087268204fcfe9fe31.png)
![potion workshop (has 2 versions!)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eb7556383059c4a216d934f4f189862ae4c16636.png)
![bedrock anvil](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4518487e990b6f730f50724e3892ef6ab27cef23.png)

</details>




Made for the Spectrum 1.9 releases on 1.21.1, but works for the most part for 1.20.1 and 1.19.2. Made in about 3 days by an amateur Minecraft player with no coding or spriting experience, you've been warned. Other notes in changelogs.

Spectrum: https://modrinth.com/mod/spectrum

Default Dark Mode: https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/default-dark-mode
